title: District Clerk
notes: Basin Elementary (Class C K-6, ~11 students), Basin MT 59631, Jefferson County. School entered NON-OPERATIONAL status for 2025-26 school year (board voted to shutter; 3-year window to reopen). Founded 1895. Head teacher Katie Thomas resigned 2025 to take Butte job. Only public-facing contact is District Clerk Michelle Hughes. Falls under Jefferson County Supt Sarah Eyer (seyer@jeffersoncounty-mt.gov) for now. Recommend de-prioritization given non-operational status.

title: Interim Superintendent

Box 10, Charlo. Note: leadership in flux -- board likely searching for permanent supt for 2026-27.
